name: claude-monitor
description: 一个本地 Web 控制台，用于统一管理多个 Claude Code session
author: yinmc7

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "node --watch server/index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n electron,client -c cyan,green "electron ." "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.electron:build:dmg: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron/builder.config.cjs --mac dmg
